title: Bombay High Court quashes Election Commission decision to hold byelection for Goa's Ponda
description: The Bombay High Court at Goa has quashed the Election Commission of India’s (ECI) notification for the conduct of a byelection at Ponda to fill the legislative assembly seat left vacant following the demise of Congress MLA Ravi Naik on October 15, 2025 [Pritam Harmalkar v. Election Commission of India & connected petitions].A Division Bench of Justices Valmiki Menezes and Amit S. Jamsandekar passed the order on Wednesday, thereby halting the bypolls a day before voting was slated to be held
